gaps: Limited long-term safety data for CAR T in autoimmune populations
Inconsistent cytokine release syndrome (CRS) grading in SLE trials
anchored.finding: Synthesized research on CAR T-cell therapy for lupus. Identified key gaps: Limited long-term safety data for CAR T in autoimmune populations, Inconsistent cytokine release syndrome (CRS) grading in SLE trials. Suggested focus on CAR T-cell.
